hero.title: Panda is a software enginer
hero.description: Passionate about crafting innovative solutions through code

quote.text: With great power comes great electricity bill
quote.author: Dr. Who

about.title: about
description: I'm a self-taught software engineer with a deep passion for programming. Despite not having a formal education in computer science, I've immersed myself in the world of coding, learning and mastering various technologies on my own. My expertise lies in Python, CPython API, and C, with a particular affinity for low-level programming.

The intricate and foundational aspects of software development fascinate me, and I enjoy the challenge of working close to the hardware. While I haven't had many notable projects yet, my dedication to continuous learning and improvement drives me forward.
Programming isn't just a skill for me—it's my passion. I am always eager to take on new opportunities that allow me to grow and apply my knowledge in meaningful ways.

contacts.title: contacts
contacts.text: I’m interested in freelance opportunities. However, if you have other request or question, don’t hesitate to contact me
